task_completion.description: Open the detailed application record for Alex Morgan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo form view for the applicant 'Alex Morgan' applying for the 'Consultant' position is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Type the required note in the chatter section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent has opened the 'Log note' section in the chatter (typically on the right side or bottom of the screen) and typed a note containing 'passed phone screening'.

task_completion.description: Successfully log the note in the chatter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The note containing 'passed phone screening' is visible as a submitted, logged entry in the chatter history for Alex Morgan.

task_completion.description: Add the 'High Potential' tag to the applicant's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag 'High Potential' is visible inside the 'Tags' field on Alex Morgan's application form.

task_completion.description: Advance the applicant to the 'First Interview' stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the pipeline status bar (top right of the form view), the 'First Interview' stage is selected/highlighted as the current active stage for the applicant.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo UI, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are open in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent actually typed and interacted with the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps of typing the note, searching/creating the tag, or clicking the stage, rather than just jumping to a completed state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Applicant Name: Alex Morgan. Job Position: Consultant. Target Stage: First Interview. Target Tag: High Potential. Required Note Content: 'passed phone screening' (must appear in the chatter messages). The task is performed on Odoo 17.
